title: mflash package manifest v1
description: Optional manifest schema for packaged .mflash archives. The manifest describes package-level metadata, not deck content.

deck_file.description: Path to the deck JSON file inside the package. For standard packages, this should be deck.json at the package root.

created_by.description: Optional application or tool that created the package. Anonymous export tools should omit this field.

created_at.description: Optional package creation timestamp. Anonymous export tools should omit this field.

media_root.description: Recommended package directory for bundled media assets.

media_type.description: Optional MIME type or general media type.
